title: God Killer Mod
description: This Mod adds a new material, with which you will be able to kill gods, all with custom textures and features and more...
body:
## About
Become an unstoppable divine force with this powerful mod that adds an incredibly strong godtier weapon and armor set to Minecraft!

## 🌟 Features
- Custom and animated textures
- New Advancements
- Full Set Bonus for the Armor 

## 📜 License
This mod is licensed under the MIT License, allowing for free use, modification, and distribution, meaning you can use this mod in your modpacks
